title: Beginner Guide
subtitle: START HERE
intro: Welcome to the beginner guide for Sword Blox Online: Rebirth.
This page is designed to help new players understand where to start, what matters early, and what mistakes to avoid.

sections.title: SYSTEM NOTICE
sections.text: Do not try to learn everything at once. Focus on surviving and understanding your build first.

sections.title: What This Guide Covers
paragraphs: This guide explains the early-game priorities for brand new players.
You do not need perfect gear or full game knowledge to get started.

sections.title: Your First Goals
items: Choose a weapon type you enjoy.
Get basic armor or protection if available.
Fight enemies you can safely handle.
Use the COL you get from mobs and quests to buy health potions.

sections.title: BEGINNER TIP
sections.text: Do the quests on floor 2 to get some good exp and starter COL.

sections.title: Swordsman Fields
sections.caption: This is the first combat floor you will come across. Focus more on the Level 1 Boars by spawn. It is slow, but you will get exp and eventually move on.

sections.title: Early Game Priorities
rows: Can get you killed or stuck

sections.title: Common Beginner Mistakes
items: Using a weapon type you dislike just because it sounds strong

sections.title: SYSTEM WARNING
sections.text: Rushing progression before you understand healing, gear, and safe farming routes can slow you down more than it helps.

sections.title: DANGER
sections.text: Do not throw all your stat points into a build just because somebody told you it is good. The BEST thing to do is do 2 Defense and 1 Strength. Do not worry about AGI, Luck, or Vitality when first starting.
